de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class DepthFirstGoalChooser

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.DefaultGoalChooser
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.DepthFirstGoalChooser
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IGoalChooser
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    SymbolicExecutionGoalChooser

    public class DepthFirstGoalChooser
extends DefaultGoalChooser
    Helper class for managing a list of goals on which rules are applied. The class provides methods for removing a goal, and for updating the internal data structures after a rule has been applied.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.DefaultGoalChooser
